channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada’s oldest WWII veteran, Burdett Sisler, passes away at 110
item.description: Burdett Sisler, Canada’s oldest known living man and one of the oldest Second World War veterans globally, passed away at the age of 110. Born in Akron, Ohio, in 1915, Sisler moved to Toronto at age t...

item.title: TRA urges continuous collaboration for efficient 24-hour fuel depot operations
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) is calling on all fuel depot operators to work closely with the authority so that depots can operate round the clock, ensuring smooth fuel supply a...

item.title: Congregants Celebrate Good Friday at Grace Bible and Regina Mundi Churches in Soweto
item.description: On Good Friday, congregants from Grace Bible Church and Regina Mundi Catholic Church came together in Soweto to observe the significant day in the Christian calendar. The event drew a considerable num...

item.title: Supporting Loved Ones Through Mental Health Struggles
item.description: Mental health challenges are a common part of life, with nearly half of Australians experiencing conditions such as depression or anxiety at some point. Hearing someone you care about say they’re ‘not...

item.title: Ricky Naidoo honoured with Ammen Award as wife donates R250,000 to Shri Mariammen Temple
item.description: Businessman Ricky Naidoo was honoured with the prestigious Ammen Award by the Shri Mariammen Temple, recognising his ongoing dedication to socio-economic upliftment and disaster relief in Tongaat and ...

item.title: March Market Update: Potato Prices Fall While Tomatoes and Poultry Climb
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, March market prices showed mixed trends across major wholesale markets like Mabibo, Temeke, Tandale, Buguruni, Ilala and Tandika. Round potatoes dropped sharply by 31%, from 130,000/...

item.title: Hobart's New South-East Asian Spot by Bar Wa Izakaya Team
item.description: Hobart locals familiar with Bar Wa Izakaya, the neon-lit, late-night Japanese eatery, now have a fresh culinary option from the same team. Their new venture, Lost in Asia, takes inspiration from acros...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange Sees Mixed Trading Activity During Easter
item.description: During the Easter period, the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) showed a mixed performance, reflecting both cautious optimism and selective investor activity. Market turnover increased by nearly 11 p...

item.title: Possible Human Remains Discovered During Easter Event at Long Beach Park
item.description: Authorities in Long Beach are investigating the discovery of what could be human remains at DeForest Park during an Easter egg hunt. The Long Beach Police Department responded to a call around 5 p.m. ...

item.title: The Crucial Role of Women in Shaping Kenya’s Next Leadership
item.description: As Kenya gears up for the 2027 General Election, much attention has gone to mobilising young voters. While that is important, it risks sidelining a key group: women. Women make up over half of the pop...

item.title: Land Bank requests extension for corporate plan submission due to cyberattack
item.description: The Land Bank has been unable to finalise and table its 2026/27 corporate plan on time following a recent ransomware cyberattack that compromised its IT systems. Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana info...

item.title: Governance Reforms at Ontario Law Society Raise Concerns About Political Bias
item.description: The Law Society of Ontario (LSO), which oversees more than 60,000 lawyers and paralegals, recently mandated a six-hour Indigenous cultural training course. While education on Canada's history is valua...

item.title: Regina Pat Canadians secure Telus Cup berth with win over Moose Jaw
item.description: The Regina Pat Canadians have earned a spot in the 2026 Telus Cup following a decisive victory against the Moose Jaw Winmar Warriors. The win, which took place on April 5, 2026, showcased the Canadian...

item.title: DCI Reviews Gachagua’s Remarks on Fuel Scandal, Promises Legal Action if Laws Breached
item.description: Nairobi – The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has stated it will take action over statements made by former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua during an Easter Sunday service at AIPCA Gako...

item.title: Tori Spelling and Four Children Injured in California Car Accident After Red-Light Collision
item.description: Actress Tori Spelling and four of her children were taken to the hospital following a traffic accident in Temecula, California, on April 2, 2026. The crash occurred when another driver allegedly ran a...

item.title: Simple One-Pot Braised Chickpeas with Chorizo and Greens
item.description: This recipe offers a fuss-free, hearty dish that combines the smokiness of chorizo with tender chickpeas, perfect for a midweek meal or a winter warmer. The method is simple: onions are gently sautéed...

item.title: Pet Shop Boys Reflect on Iconic Visuals, Artistic Freedom, and Career Highlights
item.description: Pet Shop Boys, the British synth-pop duo, have long been celebrated not only for their music but also for their groundbreaking visual style. A new 600-page book, 'Pet Shop Boys: Volume', documents ove...

item.title: The Global Risks of Tactical Nuclear Weapons
item.description: Even a limited nuclear exchange, often referred to as a 'small nuclear war,' could have catastrophic consequences far beyond the battlefield. Tactical nuclear weapons, despite being lower yield than s...

item.title: Ruth Higgins SC appointed as Australia’s first female Solicitor-General
item.description: Australia has made history with the appointment of barrister Ruth Higgins SC as the nation’s first female Solicitor-General. Announced by Attorney-General Michelle Rowland, Dr Higgins brings over 30 y...

item.title: Moody’s revises India’s 2026-27 GDP growth estimate to 6% amid West Asia conflict
item.description: Global ratings agency Moody’s has revised India’s economic growth projection for the financial year 2026-27 from 6.8% to 6%, primarily due to disruptions caused by the ongoing conflict in West Asia. T...
